## SG Ticket
- [ ] Linked issue in format `SG-XXXX` (example: `Closes #11`)
- Ticket URL:

## Change Summary
- What changed:
- Why it changed:
- Scope boundaries (what is intentionally not changed):

## Test Evidence
- [ ] Local execution completed
- Commands run:
  - `npm run ...`
- Result summary:
- Report/log paths (if applicable):

## Environment and Runtime Notes
- SHIELD target used (dev/stage/local):
- Env assumptions or required secrets:
- Any non-default runtime settings:

## Diagnostics and Risk
- Runtime/container diagnostics reviewed: Yes / No
- If failure occurred, artifact/report references:
- Residual risks or follow-up actions:

## Contributor Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/SG-XXXX-short-description` (contributors) or approved automation branch naming
- [ ] Changes are scoped to the linked ticket
- [ ] Tests are deterministic (no random sleeps / flaky timing assumptions)
- [ ] No secrets, passwords, or private URLs committed
- [ ] Docs updated for behavioral/process changes
